info.name: Smart Kitchen API
info.description:
Node.js + Express + MySQL + Sequelize + Socket.IO REST API for the Smart Kitchen project.

Variables:
- baseUrl = http://localhost:3000/api
- adminId / adminRole — Ellen Levin (userId 2)
- chefId / chefRole — Lior Rubinshtein (userId 1)
- influencerId / influencerRole — Shir Mizrahi (userId 6)
- userId / userRole — Daniel Levi (userId 4)

item.name: Get All Users - Filter by Role
Get User - Admin reads other user
